summary: Frontend testing of scrolling fixes and card flip functionality. All 8 requested features verified working: vertical scrolling on landing page, marketplace, and minted-photos pages; swipe-to-flip gesture; tap-to-flip fallback; SelfieMatchModal z-index (9999/10000); UpgradeModal z-index (10000); MAX_ATTEMPTS = 6.
critical_code_review_comments: Scrolling implementation is robust - uses CSS touch-action: pan-y as primary mechanism
Swipe gesture detection does NOT call preventDefault() - allows scroll to work naturally
Images have pointer-events: none to prevent touch capture
Modal z-indexes are correctly set: SelfieMatchModal (9999/10000), UpgradeModal (10000), flipped card (100)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All scrolling and card flip features verified working. CSS touch-action rules in index.css are comprehensive. Swipe gesture uses passive detection (no preventDefault). Modals have high z-index to appear above flipped cards.

landing_page_scroll.details: Vertical scrolling works when touching carousel items. touch-action: pan-x pan-y on carousel, pan-y on body.

marketplace_scroll.details: Vertical scrolling works when touching listing cards. touch-action: pan-y on cards, pointer-events: none on images.

minted_photos_scroll.details: Vertical scrolling works when touching photo cards. touch-action: pan-y on cards, pointer-events: none on images.

swipe_to_flip_gesture.details: Horizontal swipe (>60px, <40px vertical, <400ms) flips photo cards. Tested with simulated touch events.

tap_to_flip_fallback.details: Clicking 'Tap to flip' button flips card. data-testid='flip-card-btn' works correctly.

selfie_modal_z_index.details: SelfieMatchModal has z-index: 9999 (overlay) and 10000 (content). Appears above flipped card (z-index: 100).

upgrade_modal_z_index.details: UpgradeModal (Dialog) has z-index: 10000. Verified via browser automation - modal appears above flipped card.

max_attempts_display.details: MAX_ATTEMPTS = 6 (3 free + 3 paid). Displayed as 'Attempts: X/6' in SelfieMatchModal.

mocked_api.note: Facebook EmbedSocial widget reactions are mocked
